---
title: "Welcome to Mr. ℝidgway's Math Classes"
toc: false
page-layout: full
body-classes: homepage
---

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem; margin-bottom: 3rem;">
<!-- ### *"Mathematics is not about numbers, equations, computations, or algorithms: it is about understanding."*
Welcome to our digital hub! Whether you are a student ready to dive into this week's chapter, or a parent looking to support your student's learning journey, you are in the right place. -->
</div>

---

### Choose Your Path

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm}
::: {.card-header .bg-primary .text-white}
#### <i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> For Students
:::
::: {.card-body}
This site is here for you to access resources, check out the syllabus, and find links to important tools.

Find your course below to get started!

[**Go to AP Calculus AB &rarr;**](AP-Calculus-AB/index.qmd)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm}
::: {.card-header .bg-success .text-white}
#### <i class="bi bi-house-door-fill"></i> For Parents
:::
::: {.card-body}
For grading policies, contact information, common questions, and more, follow the link below!

[**Read the Syllabus &rarr;**](#)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm}
::: {.card-header .bg-info .text-white}
#### <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i> Courses & Resources
:::
::: {.card-body}
*(List out your quick links here. This is a great spot for links to Desmos, your school's gradebook portal, or the College Board website.)*

* [AP Calculus AB](AP-Calculus-AB/index.qmd)
:::
:::
:::

:::

---

### <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i> About Me

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="30%"}
<!-- ![](profile.jpg){style="border-radius: 50%; max-width: 80%; display: block; margin: 0 auto;"} -->
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}
Hi, I'm Cole ℝidgway! 

I moved to Boise in 2018 to attend Boise State University, where I earned a double major with a Bachelors of Science in Mathematics with a Secondary Education emphasis as well as a Bachelors of Science in Applied Mathematics. After that, I went back to Boise State to complete my Masters in Mathematics, where I completed a project comparing polynomial interpolating methods for approximating functions. 

During my time at Boise State, I taught a variety of courses as a Graduate Teaching Assistant, including College Algebra, Precalculus, Business Precalculus, and introductory math courses. I also had the opportunity to build a pilot calculus class for the university, where I developed a curriculum alongside the instructor.

I have been teaching at Meridian High School since 2025, and I am currently teaching AP Calculus AB, Math I, and Math III. I am passionate about making math accessible and engaging for all students, and I am excited to share my resources with you through this website!
:::
:::
